name: biohack-claude
description: Will Norris's personal Claude Code marketplace — techops, design, and personal productivity plugins.

plugins.name: cf-static-site
plugins.description: Set up a new static site on Cloudflare — Workers + Terraform + GH Actions, or plain Pages. Two paths: full Astro stack or plain HTML.

plugins.name: new-web-apt-repo
plugins.description: Provision a web-hosted signed APT repo on Cloudflare R2, backed by aptly + GitHub Actions.

plugins.name: claude-housekeeping
plugins.description: Audit Claude Code artifacts for drift — skills, hooks, memories, settings, and plans — across global ~/.claude and every project.

plugins.name: package
plugins.description: Package a program as a Debian-policy-compliant .deb for a foundry-style apt repo. Handles binaries, scripts, and source packages.

plugins.name: import-claude-design
plugins.description: Import a Claude Design export zip into site/ and deploy via tag-triggered CI.

plugins.name: iam-bootstrap
plugins.description: Set up AWS IAM credentials for a new project — Terraform user, state backend, and self-narrowing permissions.

plugins.name: cf-domain-setup
plugins.description: Add a domain to Cloudflare on the free plan — scoped API token, zone creation, and activation polling via curl.

plugins.name: aws-billing-tags
plugins.description: Set up AWS cost tracking, billing tags, budget alerts, and Cost Explorer for a project.

plugins.name: biohack-shell
plugins.description: Tab colour hooks (session-start / stop / prompt-submit) and productivity slash commands from Will's personal Claude Code setup.

plugins.name: install-gnome-usage
plugins.description: One-shot installer for the Claude Usage Indicator GNOME extension. Self-removes after install.

plugins.name: new-installer
plugins.description: Scaffold a one-shot self-removing installer command — for any marketplace plugin or as a standalone slash command. Verify, install, vanish.
